name: Haimo Technologies Group Corp.
summary: Haimo Technologies Group Corp. manufactures and sells oilfield equipment and instruments for oilfield service companies in China, the Middle East, North Africa, Central, South and Southeast Asia, and North and South America. It offers multiphase flow meters (MPFM), wet gas meters, bulk multiphase meters, high performance and low production testers, shale oil/gas meters, and mobile well testing and production measurement services. The company also provides fluid end assemblies for fracking; accessories, including joints, valves, and valve seating products; ball injectors; and high pressure fluid components and manifolds. In addition, it offers environmental protection equipment and services, such as wastewater treatment and reuse, solid waste disposal, and contaminated soil remediation from industries of oil and gas production and refinery, municipal, mining and chemical processing, etc. Further, the company provides integrated production optimization services, as well as value added services, including data validation and cleansing, well testing verification and optimization, intelligent allocation, water injection optimization, real-time well monitoring and alarm systems, and production analysis and enhancement consultation services. Additionally, it is involved in the oil and gas exploration, development, and production activities. The company was formerly known as Lanzhou Haimo Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haimo Technologies Group Corp. in November 2016. Haimo Technologies Group Corp. was founded in 1994 and is based in Lanzhou, China.
